======= :root{color-scheme:light dark;} body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,"PingFang SC","Microsoft YaHei",sans-serif;background:#f4f2eb;color:#1f1f1f;display:grid;place-items:center;min-height:100vh;} main{padding:24px 28px;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);text-align:center;max-width:480px;} a{display:inline-block;margin-top:16px;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:999px;background:#4a3aa7;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;}
